content.json:
## SOCRadar Entra ID — Combined Dashboard
All employee credential exposures across SOCRadar sources (Botnet Data, PII Exposure, VIP Protection), enriched with Microsoft Entra ID status and remediation actions.

parameters.name: TenantId
parameters.label: Entra ID Tenant
parameters.query:
union isfuzzy=true SOCRadar_Botnet_CL, SOCRadar_PII_CL, SOCRadar_VIP_CL
| where isnotempty(entra_tenant_id)
| distinct entra_tenant_id
| project value = entra_tenant_id, label = entra_tenant_id
| union (datatable(value:string, label:string)['All','All'])
| order by label asc

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true SOCRadar_Botnet_CL, SOCRadar_PII_CL, SOCRadar_VIP_CL
| where '{TenantId}' == 'All' or entra_tenant_id == '{TenantId}'
| count
| project Count
content.title: Total Records (All Sources)

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true SOCRadar_Botnet_CL, SOCRadar_PII_CL, SOCRadar_VIP_CL
| where '{TenantId}' == 'All' or entra_tenant_id == '{TenantId}'
| where entra_status == "found"
| count
| project Count
content.title: Employees Found in Entra ID

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true SOCRadar_Botnet_CL, SOCRadar_PII_CL, SOCRadar_VIP_CL
| where '{TenantId}' == 'All' or entra_tenant_id == '{TenantId}'
| where entra_status == "compromised"
| count
| project Count
content.title: Confirmed Compromised

content.query:
SOCRadar_EntraID_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Actions=sum(toint(actions_taken))
| project Actions
content.title: Actions Taken (24h)

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(SOCRadar_Botnet_CL | extend Source="Botnet"),
(SOCRadar_PII_CL | extend Source="PII"),
(SOCRadar_VIP_CL | extend Source="VIP")
| summarize Count=count() by Source
| order by Count desc
content.title: Records by Source

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(SOCRadar_Botnet_CL | extend Source="Botnet"),
(SOCRadar_PII_CL | extend Source="PII"),
(SOCRadar_VIP_CL | extend Source="VIP")
| summarize Count=count() by entra_status, Source
| order by Count desc
content.title: Entra ID Status by Source

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(SOCRadar_Botnet_CL | extend Source="Botnet"),
(SOCRadar_PII_CL | extend Source="PII"),
(SOCRadar_VIP_CL | extend Source="VIP")
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), Source
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Records Over Time by Source

content.query:
SOCRadar_EntraID_Audit_CL
| summarize Count=count() by source
| order by Count desc
content.title: Import Runs by Source

content.query:
SOCRadar_EntraID_Audit_CL
| summarize Found=sum(toint(found_count)), NotFound=sum(toint(not_found_count)), Actions=sum(toint(actions_taken)), Errors=sum(toint(error_count)) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Audit Metrics Over Time

content.query:
SOCRadar_EntraID_Audit_CL
| project TimeGenerated, source, total_records, employee_records, found_count, not_found_count, actions_taken, error_count, duration_sec
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 30
content.title: Recent Import Runs

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(SOCRadar_Botnet_CL | extend Source="Botnet"),
(SOCRadar_PII_CL | extend Source="PII")
| where entra_status in ("found", "compromised")
| where password_present == true
| project TimeGenerated, Source, email, entra_status, is_plaintext, actions_taken
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Employees Found in Entra ID with Password

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true SOCRadar_Botnet_CL, SOCRadar_PII_CL, SOCRadar_VIP_CL
| where '{TenantId}' == 'All' or entra_tenant_id == '{TenantId}'
| where isnotempty(entra_tenant_id)
| extend src = case(Type == 'SOCRadar_Botnet_CL', 'Botnet', Type == 'SOCRadar_PII_CL', 'PII', Type == 'SOCRadar_VIP_CL', 'VIP', 'Other')
| summarize Records=count(), Found=countif(entra_status == 'found'), Compromised=countif(entra_status == 'compromised') by entra_tenant_id, src
| order by Records desc
content.title: Tenant Breakdown
